ARBITRATOR MARTE JOSEPH BASSI APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-10-2008 THROUGH JAN-08-2009.

DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT WILLIAM LO'S MOTION FOR ORDER DISMISSING PLAINTIFF'S ACTION DENIED. IN LIEU OF THE REQUESTED TERMINATING SANCTION, THE COURT ORDERS THE FOLLOWING ISSUE SANCTIONS: 1. THAT PLAINTIFF IS PRECLUDED FROM TESTIFYING ON HER OWN BEHALF AT TRIAL; 2. THAT PLAINTIFF IS PRECLUDED FROM INTRODUCING IN EVIDENCE AT TRIAL ANY EVIDENCE PERTAINING TO HER INJURIES; MEDICAL DIAGNOSIS, TREATMENT AND CARE; THE COST OF ANY SUCH DIAGNOSIS, TREATMENT AND CARE; AND ANY EVIDENCE PERTAINING TO ANY CLAIM FOR LOST WAGES OR INCOME. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, NOT REPORTED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to appear at Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference on 11/17/2008 is ordered off calendar/Dismissal on file. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR# 5162. (212)

PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Continued To Jan-08-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Dismissing Pltf'S Action
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant William Lo's Motion For Order Dismissing Plaintiff's Action denied.
In lieu of the requested terminating sanction, the Court orders the following issue sanctions:
1. That plaintiff is precluded from testifying on her own behalf at trial;
2. That plaintiff is precluded from introducing in evidence at trial any evidence pertaining to her injuries; medical diagnosis, treatment and care; the cost of any such diagnosis, treatment and care; and any evidence pertaining to any claim for lost wages or income. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Inspection Demand; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant William Lo's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $300 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
